user.title: Ceangal BookStack

data.verify_ssl: Fíoraigh teastas TLS (díchumasaigh i gcás féin-shínithe)

book.title: Roghnaigh leabhar sprice
book.description: Cén leabhar inar chóir do Home Assistant sioncronú? Coinneofar ábhar a cuireadh leis na leathanaigh de láimh.

reauth_confirm.title: Athnuaigh comhartha BookStack
reauth_confirm.description: Dhiúltaigh BookStack don chomhartha API le haghaidh {base_url}. Cruthaigh comhartha nua i BookStack agus greamaigh an ID agus an rún anseo — fanann an URL agus an leabhar sprice mar an gcéanna.

reconfigure.title: Coigeartaigh ceangal BookStack
reconfigure.description: Athraigh URL, comhartha nó socrú TLS an cheangail seo. Coinnítear an leabhar sprice agus na mapálacha leathanaigh go léir. Ní mór don URL pointeáil chuig an sampla BookStack céanna agus a bhí roimhe seo.

data.verify_ssl: Fíoraigh teastas TLS (díchumasaigh i gcás féin-shínithe)

error.auth: Diúltaíodh don chomhartha API nó tá ceadanna in easnamh.
error.no_books: Níor aimsíodh aon leabhar sa sampla BookStack seo. Cruthaigh leabhar sprice ar dtús.
error.unknown: Earráid gan choinne — seiceáil loga Home Assistant.
error.base_url_invalid_scheme: Ní mór do URL tosú le http:// nó https://.
error.base_url_missing_host: Tá an URL neamhiomlán — ainm óstaigh ar iarraidh.
error.path_invalid: Path must be absolute and the parent directory must already exist.
error.export_already_enabled_elsewhere: Markdown export is already enabled on another BookStack Sync instance. Only one instance per Home Assistant setup may export - otherwise the Markdown files collide. Disable the export on the other instance first.

abort.already_configured: Tá an sampla BookStack seo cumraithe cheana féin.
abort.url_mismatch: Pointeálann an URL nua chuig sampla BookStack difriúil. Bain an iontráil bhunaidh agus cuir ceann nua leis.

data.export_after_sync: Run export automatically after each sync

data_description.export_enabled: Off by default. When on, BookStack pages are written back as plain Markdown files for use as RAG / LLM input. Costs disk space and CPU on every export run, which is why it must be enabled consciously.
data_description.export_path: Where to write the Markdown files. Must be absolute and the parent directory must exist.
data_description.export_after_sync: Only effective when 'Enable Markdown back-export' is on.

run_now.name: Sioncronú anois
run_now.description: Tosaíonn sioncronú láithreach gan fanacht leis an eatramh.

preview.name: Réamhamharc sioncronaithe
preview.description: Logáil cad iad na leathanaigh a chruthófaí/nuashonrófaí gan rud ar bith a scríobh chuig BookStack.

export_markdown.name: Export Markdown (opt-in)
export_markdown.description: Exports every managed BookStack page as a plain Markdown file with YAML frontmatter, idempotent. Disabled by default - enable it in the integration's options first.

dry_run.name: Dry run
dry_run.description: Log what would be written without touching the filesystem.

output_path.name: Output path override
output_path.description: Override the configured export path for this call only.

bookstack_unreachable.title: Tá BookStack do-rochtana
bookstack_unreachable.description: Níor éirigh leis an gcomhtháthú BookStack Sync an sampla BookStack a shroicheadh i {count} sioncronaithe as a chéile. Cúiseanna coitianta: tá an coimeádán BookStack stoptha, fadhb líonra, nó tá seachfhreastalaí droim ar ais ag diúltú do na ceangail. Réiteoidh an chéad sioncronú rathúil eile an fógra seo go huathoibríoch.

page_tampered.title: Cuireadh bloc AUTO de leathanach in eagar de láimh
page_tampered.description: Tá bloc AUTO ag an leathanach „{page_title}" i BookStack a cuireadh in eagar lasmuigh de Home Assistant. Lig an comhtháthú thar an leathanach seo le linn sioncronaithe chun gan d'athruithe a fhorscríobh. Bog do nótaí go dtí an bloc MANUAL nó cealaigh an t-athrú sa bhloc AUTO ionas gur féidir leis an gcéad sioncronú eile an leathanach a nuashonrú arís.

bookstack_unreachable.message: Tá an sampla BookStack do-rochtana (féach loga Home Assistant le haghaidh sonraí).

bookstack_auth_failed.message: Dhiúltaigh BookStack don chomhartha API. Athnuaigh an comhartha i BookStack agus úsáid sreabh Reauth.

export_disabled.message: Markdown export is disabled. Enable it in the integration's options under 'Enable Markdown back-export' before calling this service.
